nasb.text: and said to them, “Thus says the Lord the God of Israel, to whom you sent me to present your petition before Him:

esv.text: and said to them, “Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, to whom you sent me to present your plea for mercy before him:

cnv.text: 對他們說：“耶和華以色列的　神，就是你們委派我去為你們向他懇求的那位，這樣說：

ccb.text: 对他们说：“你们让我向以色列的上帝耶和华祈求，耶和华这样说，
